response.justification: The candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and proven ability to architect large-scale data systems, directly applicable to routing tile pipelines. However, there is a critical gap: C++ is the primary requirement and the resume shows no modern C++ experience since 2014-2015, with primary recent work in TypeScript and DLang. While the role emphasizes willingness to expand expertise, the 10-year gap in the primary technology is a substantial onboarding risk for a mid-senior IC position.
strengths: Deep geospatial data expertise through GISCollective platform and navigation systems work at Green Map and Optilyz
Proven ability to design and optimize large-scale data pipelines handling millions of requests and events at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong systems and performance optimization background with async I/O, caching, and high-performance database experience
concerns: No modern C++ experience; last substantial C++ work was 2014-2015 with a 10-year gap since then
No Rust experience; primary recent languages are JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not systems programming languages
No explicit domain knowledge of routing systems or navigation tile optimization, despite GIS background

key_factors.factor: Large-scale system architecture and optimization experience
